## Summary

- What changed?
- What problem does it solve?

## Change Type

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Parser/checker/graph/tooling change
- [ ] Language design direction change
- [ ] Standard library, profile, security, backend, or package direction change

## Ground Truth

- [ ] I checked [../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] I checked [../docs/LANGUAGE_REFERENCE.md](../docs/LANGUAGE_REFERENCE.md)
      when source syntax changed
- [ ] I updated [../examples/reference_surface.hum](../examples/reference_surface.hum)
      or explained why not
- [ ] I used [../docs/RFC_TEMPLATE.md](../docs/RFC_TEMPLATE.md) for any large
      language direction change

## Verification

- [ ] I ran [../tools/check_all.ps1](../tools/check_all.ps1)
- [ ] I did not add secrets, `.env` files, personal paths, or editor-local
      state
- [ ] I did not create tags, publish packages, push release artifacts, or change
      remote settings

- Risks or tradeoffs:
- Follow-up work:
